issue: Partly-cloudy-day has config schema and static validation, but the browser baseline observed authorized-vendor legacy routing while partly-cloudy-night observed config-driven routing.
user_impact: Architecture and QA docs overstate the browser-active config renderer coverage for day clouds.

issue: Visibility is not part of CurrentConditions, provider variable lists, normalizers, or WeatherDetailsGrid.
user_impact: A common weather detail from the requested completion checklist is absent.

issue: WeatherAlertSection renders only Caiyun alerts; Open-Meteo forecasts normalize alerts to an empty list.
user_impact: Users on the default provider may reasonably believe alerts are unsupported or unavailable without explicit provider labeling.

issue: Some critical states are code-verified but not browser-verified in the current reusable harness: location denied, empty city search, unsupported long-range, air-quality failure, and cache storage unavailable.
user_impact: The module is hard to freeze because real error-state coverage is not yet reproducible from one local command.

issue: Additional weather scene migrations beyond partly cloudy are not justified by current product risk.
user_impact: Further migration would spend effort without improving the closeout path.

issue: The existing build still reports a large async lib chunk; no weather-specific regression was observed.
user_impact: This may matter for later app-wide bundle work but does not block weather closeout.

issue: Texture reuse policy remains measurement-driven only; LB-2D runtime checks showed bounded lifecycle behavior.
user_impact: Only revisit if browser metrics show repeated scene-switch churn.

issue: No additional Xiaomi Weather reverse engineering is needed unless a concrete LifeBoard implementation decision is blocked.
user_impact: Continuing broad reverse work would not improve the LifeBoard closeout decision.

issue: Clear-day migration remains stopped; current clear-day should stay on the legacy authorized-vendor path.
user_impact: Avoids forcing a lower-fidelity config renderer for a scene whose current browser baseline is better.

issue: Full renderer unification is not required for weather module completion.
user_impact: The mixed renderer is the formal current architecture.
